tasks.label: Run demo stack (backend + iCal)
args: cd /workspaces/BirthdayCalendar/frontend && npm run build && cd /workspaces/BirthdayCalendar/storage/demo-ical && python3 -m http.server 8090 --bind 0.0.0.0 >/tmp/demo-ical.log 2>&1 & cd /workspaces/BirthdayCalendar/backend && ICAL_URL=http://localhost:8090/birthdays.ics PUBLIC_DIR=../frontend/dist ./build/birthday_backend
